structural_notes: All 5 guides use 3-column SP format (with Term) — consistent with graduate-family format
All 5 guides share an MSN Core group plus specialty groups; FNP and PMHNP have 3 groups (adding Nurse Practitioner Core)
Clinical/preceptor sections appear as ordinary named courses within AoS groups — not structural anomalies
Page counts valid: 13-15 pages across all 5 guides
Phase A manifest MEDIUM classification and clinical concern flag were unfounded
